ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand associated with the size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category for the size chart */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the size chart is applicable */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size chart */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size chart */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the size chart is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for brand inquiries */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's logo */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the brand is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Youth, Women) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is currently active */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for the category (e.g., Male, Female, Unisex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart it belongs to */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., J4, J6) */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement */,
  "hollow_to_floor" REAL /* Hollow-to-floor measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Measurement unit (e.g., Inch, CM) */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement */,
  "inseam_length" REAL /* Inseam length measurement */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement */,
  "neck" REAL /* Neck measurement */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the size is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size being rated */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "rating" REAL /* Overall rating given by the customer (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* General comments provided by the customer regarding the size */,
  "fitment_rating" REAL /* Rating for fitment (1-5 scale) */,
  "sizing_rating" REAL /* Rating for sizing accuracy (1-5 scale) */,
  "comfort_rating" REAL /* Rating for comfort (1-5 scale) */,
  "fitment_comments" TEXT /* Specific comments on fitment */,
  "sizing_comments" TEXT /* Specific comments on sizing */,
  "comfort_comments" TEXT /* Specific comments on comfort */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feedback is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the platform */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., Inch, CM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the measurement unit */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the unit is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Designer, Manager) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the role is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart being reported on */,
  "total_feedback" INTEGER /* Total feedback entries for the size chart */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating based on customer feedback */,
  "total_fitment_rating" INTEGER /* Total fitment rating */,
  "average_fitment_rating" REAL /* Average fitment rating */,
  "total_sizing_rating" INTEGER /* Total sizing rating */,
  "average_sizing_rating" REAL /* Average sizing rating */,
  "total_comfort_rating" INTEGER /* Total comfort rating */,
  "average_comfort_rating" REAL /* Average comfort rating */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the report is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_reports_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)
